chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1338 of 2019 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 09.09.2025 Mr. Niazuddin Memon, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ubedullah Malano, Advocate for respondent/SEPCO Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General ************** As per comments filed by the respondents/SEPCO and the assertion of the learned DAG, the order dated 03.07.2019 passed by the Electric Inspector has been implemented. However, counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has not contacted him for a long time. In these circumstances, the present petition, having become infructuous, stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
